name: Default small business
pitchTone: Warm, specific, and never pushy. Treat the owner like they are busy and skeptical of cold callers, and lead with one concrete signal from the public research before making any ask.
valuePropHook: A flat $500 single-page website that clearly explains what they do and gives customers one obvious next step, hosted and ready same day.

objections.response: That is helpful to know. This would not replace it; it is a focused conversion page with the most important services, proof, and contact step, so customers do not have to dig.

objections.objection: I am too busy right now.
objections.response: Totally fair. I only need the best email for the invoice; the page can be drafted from the public business info I already have, and you can reply with corrections.
I can send it through AgentMail. The only thing worth deciding on the call is whether a flat $500 same-day page is worth considering at all.
I get it. The whole point of this offer is to avoid a drawn-out agency project: one flat $500 page, hosted, with the essentials customers need before they call.
Reasonable question. The invoice comes from AgentMail, you can reply right there with questions, and nothing starts unless you actually pay it.

siteTemplateHint: Use the default style: clean and professional, neutral base with one brand accent, hero with name and tap-to-call CTA, short service section, and a contact section.
customerPersonaHint: Local prospects who searched for the business by name or category and want to confirm legitimacy and how to reach them.
